sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84213" key="poqhtu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποθ-ητύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ύος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πόθησις,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:609" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.609</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
